# Nytta AI

> AI consulting for small businesses in Sweden. Free first analysis, then software & IoT hardware implementation if you want it.

Nytta AI is a software and hardware (IoT) consulting firm based in Sweden. We help small businesses identify where AI can realistically improve their operations — saving time, money, or eliminating repetitive work. The first analysis is always free and the client keeps the written plan regardless of whether they proceed.

## Services

- **Free AI Readiness Analysis**: We walk through your operations and pinpoint where AI could save time or cut costs. No charge, no obligation.
- **Custom AI Plan**: A written, concrete plan tailored to your specific business — not a template.
- **Software & Hardware (IoT) Implementation**: We build the solution ourselves — chatbots, automation tools, IoT sensor networks, and more. Built, connected, handed over working.

## Pricing

- First analysis: always free (0 kr)
- Implementation: scoped and priced per case — no fixed packages

## About

- 15+ years combined experience in software and hardware/IoT
- Engineers first, advisors second — advice grounded in what can actually be built
- Based in Sweden; work in Swedish, English, and Arabic
- Direct contact only — phone and WhatsApp, no contact forms

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +46 70 797 65 92
- Website: https://nytta-ai.se/

## Process

1. Reach out by phone or WhatsApp
2. Free analysis — we learn how your business runs today
3. You receive a written AI plan (yours to keep)
4. Optional: we build the implementation together
